title: Image Generation
description: Generate images from text prompts using multiple AI providers. Supports GPT, Gemini, Grok, FLUX, and Riverflow models with automatic API fallback to OpenRouter.

image_gpt.title: GPT Image 1.5
image_gpt.description: Generate images using OpenAI GPT Image 1.5.

image_gpt_mini.title: GPT Image 1 Mini
image_gpt_mini.description: Generate images using OpenAI GPT Image 1 Mini (faster, cheaper).

image_gemini_pro.title: Nano Banana Pro
image_gemini_pro.description: Generate images using Google Gemini 3 Pro.

image_gemini_flash.title: Nano Banana 2
image_gemini_flash.description: Generate images using Google Gemini 3.1 Flash (faster, cheaper).

image_grok_pro.title: Grok Imagine Pro
image_grok_pro.description: Generate images using xAI Grok Imagine Image Pro.

image_grok.title: Grok Imagine
image_grok.description: Generate images using xAI Grok Imagine Image (faster, cheaper).

image_flux_pro.title: FLUX.2 Pro
image_flux_pro.description: Generate images using FLUX.2 Pro via OpenRouter.

image_riverflow.title: Riverflow v2 Fast
image_riverflow.description: Generate images using Riverflow v2 Fast via OpenRouter.

image_minimax.title: MiniMax image-01
image_minimax.description: Generate images using MiniMax image-01. Supports subject reference.

states.description: States for each image generation skill (disabled, public, or private)
